src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Increase the maximum number of retry attempts from 3 to 5 to handle transient API failures more robustly.
Add informational logging when a successful response is received from the API to aid in debugging.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.human_impl: log.info("Successfully received response from Gemini API on attempt {}", attempt);

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Extract the HTTP status code into a local variable to avoid repeated method calls and improve readability.
Change the behavior for 403 Forbidden errors when devFallback is disabled to throw a RuntimeException instead of returning null.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.human_impl: throw new RuntimeException("Gemini API authentication failed (403). Please check API key configuration.");

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Implement specific exponential backoff logic for 503 Service Unavailable errors to handle API overload gracefully.
Throw a RuntimeException if 503 errors persist after all retry attempts, instead of returning null.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.human_impl: throw new RuntimeException("Gemini API is currently unavailable (503). Please try again in a few minutes.");

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Throw a RuntimeException for other HTTP errors after exhausting retries, instead of returning null.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.human_impl: throw new RuntimeException(String.format("Gemini API error (%d) after %d attempts", statusCode, maxAttempts));

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Increase the base backoff time for generic HTTP errors from 300ms to 500ms per attempt.
Throw a RuntimeException for transport errors after exhausting retries, instead of returning null.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.human_impl: throw new RuntimeException("Failed to connect to Gemini API after " + maxAttempts + " attempts", we);

src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.general_idea: Increase the base backoff time for transport errors from 300ms to 500ms per attempt.
Throw a RuntimeException if no response body is obtained after all retries, instead of returning null.
src/main/java/com/recipe/ai/service/Reci.human_impl: throw new RuntimeException("Failed to get response from Gemini API after " + maxAttempts + " attempts");

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven build stage base image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to 21 to support Java 21 compilation.
Upgrade the final runtime base image from distroless Java 17 to Java 21 to ensure the application runs on the target JDK.
